profile.name: Sourav Pattanaik
profile.subTagline: I use the lens of bioinformatics to study Biological Phenomena.

pillars.title: Education
bullets: Integrated Master's of Science in Biology with a Minor degree in Chemistry, NISER '26
Competative Exams: NEST (AIR 263), GATE (AIR 1173), OJEE (State Rank 3), OUAT (AIR 81)

pillars.title: Research
bullets: Published article on Multi-epitope vaccine design against structural proteins of Langya Virus
Research project on Sepsis early diagnosis supported by the Indian Academy of Sciences
Computational study focusing on discovering novel treatment strategy for Testicular Cancer
Recieved Support of ₹4,00,000 for Integrated Master's program through DAE-DISHA Scholar (2021-2026)
Check my CV for other achievements and stay tuned for more cool updates

Bronze Medals in Inter-batch Badminton (2025) and Football (2024) Competetions

Finalist of BENSPARK Ideathon, IISER Pune

academics: Focusing on the integration of network-based drug discovery and stimulus-responsive drug carriers.
Utilizing computational techniques like CG-Molecular Dynamics and Protein-DNA Docking.
sports: Insights into varsity basketball competition at IISM 2023.
Maintaining high academic standards (9.82 SGPA) while excelling in competitive sports.
cocurricular: Managing financial responsibilities and campus policy-making.
Engaging in translational research ideation through platforms like BENSPARK.
